p2p_enrich.notes: Added 2 new pass_to_pass tests from repo CI: (1) test_uv_platform_tags_cargo_test - runs 'cargo test --package uv-platform-tags' to verify all crate tests pass, (2) test_uv_platform_tags_clippy - runs 'cargo clippy --package uv-platform-tags --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings' to verify linting passes. CI commands discovered from .github/workflows/test.yml (cargo nextest run), .github/workflows/check-lint.yml (cargo clippy), .github/workflows/check-fmt.yml (cargo fmt). Full test suite uses cargo nextest but cargo test works for single crate. Clippy command matches upstream CI with -D warnings. Skipped: cargo fmt (requires rustfmt component), cargo shear (unused dep checker - not critical), ruff/ty (Python linters - not relevant to Rust crate).
